---
title: "iSN snRNA-seq Pipeline — Final Report"
subtitle: "`r paste0(toupper(params$track), ' track | ', Sys.Date())`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: flatly
    self_contained: true
    dev: ragg_png
params:
  project_root: "/scratch/rmlab/rmlab_shared3/tyron/Rscriptv2/iSN/iSN_claude"
  track: "decontx"
  gene_sets: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.align = "center", dev = "ragg_png")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = params$project_root)
options(knitr.graphics.rel_path = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(patchwork)
library(viridis)
library(scales)
library(tidyr)
library(ggrepel)
```

```{r track-setup}
track_display    <- ifelse(params$track == "decontx", "decontX", "soupX")
timepoint_colors <- c(Day13 = "#4E8FCA", Day7 = "#D73027", iPSC = "#F5A623")
```

---

## Section 0: Pipeline Summary

```{r pipeline-summary}
# --- define paths ---
if (params$track == "decontx") {
  rds_01  <- file.path(params$project_root,
                       "scripts/01.2_DecontX/DecontX_out/iSN_decontX.rds")
  rds_02  <- file.path(params$project_root,
                       "scripts/02.1_scDblFinder_decontX/scDblFinder_output/iSN_decontX_scDblFinder.rds")
  rds_03  <- file.path(params$project_root,
                       "scripts/03_Cell_filtering/Cell_filtering_output/03_seu_cellfiltered_decontx.rds")
  rds_04  <- file.path(params$project_root,
                       "scripts/04_Clustering/clustering_output/04_seu_clustered_decontx.rds")
  s01_method <- "DecontX"
  s02_method <- "scDblFinder (DecontX track)"
} else {
  rds_02  <- file.path(params$project_root,
                       "scripts/02_scDblFinder_soupx/scDblFinder_output/iSN_doubletstep.rds")
  rds_03  <- file.path(params$project_root,
                       "scripts/03_Cell_filtering/Cell_filtering_output/03_seu_cellfiltered_soupx.rds")
  rds_04  <- file.path(params$project_root,
                       "scripts/04_Clustering/clustering_output/04_seu_clustered_soupx.rds")
  s01_method <- "SoupX"
  s02_method <- "scDblFinder (SoupX track)"
}

# --- load each RDS once ---
if (params$track == "decontx") {
  seu_01 <- readRDS(rds_01)
  n_01_in  <- ncol(seu_01)
  n_01_out <- ncol(seu_01)   # DecontX corrects but does not filter

  seu_02 <- readRDS(rds_02)
  n_02_in  <- ncol(seu_01)
  n_02_out <- sum(seu_02$scDblFinder.class == "singlet")
} else {
  # SoupX track: Stage 01 is per-sample correction; Stage 02 RDS is the merged object
  seu_02 <- readRDS(rds_02)
  n_01_in  <- ncol(seu_02)
  n_01_out <- ncol(seu_02)   # SoupX corrects but does not filter nuclei count
  n_02_in  <- ncol(seu_02)
  n_02_out <- sum(seu_02$scDblFinder.class == "singlet")
}

seu_03 <- readRDS(rds_03)
n_03_in  <- ncol(seu_02)
n_03_out <- ncol(seu_03)

seu_04 <- readRDS(rds_04)
n_04_in  <- ncol(seu_03)
n_04_out <- ncol(seu_04)

# --- build summary table ---
summary_tbl <- data.frame(
  Stage   = c("01 — Ambient RNA Removal",
              "02 — Doublet Removal",
              "03 — Cell Filtering",
              "04 — Clustering"),
  Method  = c(s01_method, s02_method, "Seurat QC filters", "Harmony + Louvain"),
  Track   = rep(track_display, 4),
  Input_nuclei  = c(n_01_in,  n_02_in,  n_03_in,  n_04_in),
  Output_nuclei = c(n_01_out, n_02_out, n_03_out, n_04_out),
  Removed       = c(n_01_in - n_01_out,
                    n_02_in - n_02_out,
                    n_03_in - n_03_out,
                    n_04_in - n_04_out),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

knitr::kable(summary_tbl,
             col.names = c("Stage", "Method", "Track",
                           "Input nuclei", "Output nuclei", "Removed"),
             caption = paste0("Pipeline summary — ", track_display, " track"))
```

---

## Section 1: Ambient RNA Removal

```{r stage01-decontx, eval=(params$track == "decontx")}
out_01 <- file.path(params$project_root, "scripts/01.2_DecontX/DecontX_out")

# Cell counts per sample
knitr::kable(as.data.frame(table(seu_01$sample_group)),
             col.names = c("Sample", "Nuclei"),
             caption = "Post-DecontX nucleus counts per sample")

# Contamination summary table
meta_01 <- seu_01@meta.data
contam_tbl <- meta_01 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(sample_group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_nuclei     = dplyr::n(),
    pct_gt_0.5   = round(mean(decontX_contamination > 0.5) * 100, 1),
    pct_gt_0.8   = round(mean(decontX_contamination > 0.8) * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
knitr::kable(contam_tbl,
             col.names = c("Sample", "Nuclei", "% contamination > 0.5", "% contamination > 0.8"),
             caption = "Contamination score summary per sample")
```

```{r stage01-decontx-hist, eval=(params$track == "decontx"), fig.width=8, fig.height=4}
ggplot(meta_01, aes(x = decontX_contamination)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 100, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.5, color = "orange", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.8, color = "red",    linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "DecontX contamination score distribution",
       x = "Contamination score", y = "Count")
```

```{r stage01-decontx-umap, eval=(params$track == "decontx"), fig.width=10}
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(out_01, "01_contamination_UMAP.png"))
```

```{r stage01-decontx-markers, eval=(params$track == "decontx"), fig.width=10}
knitr::include_graphics(file.path(out_01, "04_markers_decontX.png"))
```

```{r stage01-soupx, eval=(params$track == "soupx")}
soupx_dirs <- c(
  "NR00_Day13_1Counts",
  "NR00_Day13_1_dupCounts",
  "NR00_Day13_2Counts",
  "NR00_Day13_2_dupCounts",
  "NR00_Day7_1Counts",
  "NR00_Day7_2Counts",
  "NR00_iPSC_1Counts",
  "NR00_iPSC_2Counts"
)

sample_names <- c(
  "NR00_Day13_1", "NR00_Day13_1_dup", "NR00_Day13_2", "NR00_Day13_2_dup",
  "NR00_Day7_1", "NR00_Day7_2", "NR00_iPSC_1", "NR00_iPSC_2"
)

soupx_base <- file.path(params$project_root, "scripts/01_SoupX/SoupX_dir_out")

seu_list <- lapply(seq_along(soupx_dirs), function(i) {
  mat <- Read10X(file.path(soupx_base, soupx_dirs[i]))
  obj <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = mat, project = as.character(i))
  obj$sample_group <- sample_names[i]
  obj
})

seu_soupx <- merge(seu_list[[1]],
                   y    = seu_list[-1],
                   add.cell.ids = sample_names)
seu_soupx$orig.ident <- seu_soupx$sample_group
seu_soupx <- NormalizeData(seu_soupx)

knitr::kable(as.data.frame(table(seu_soupx$sample_group)),
             col.names = c("Sample", "Nuclei"),
             caption = "Post-SoupX nucleus counts per sample")
```

```{r stage01-soupx-vln, eval=(params$track == "soupx"), fig.width=12, fig.height=5}
VlnPlot(seu_soupx, features = c("nCount_RNA", "nFeature_RNA"),
        group.by = "sample_group", pt.size = 0.01, ncol = 2) &
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

---

## Section 2: Doublet Removal

```{r doublet-rate-table}
db_summary <- seu_02@meta.data %>%
  dplyr::group_by(sample_group, scDblFinder.class) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(n = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = scDblFinder.class, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(total       = singlet + doublet,
                pct_doublet = round(doublet / total * 100, 1))
knitr::kable(db_summary,
             caption = paste0("Doublet rate per sample (", track_display,
                              " track) — flag: >15% is unusual"))
```

```{r doublet-rate-flag, results='asis'}
flagged <- db_summary$sample_group[db_summary$pct_doublet > 15]
if (length(flagged) > 0) {
  cat("**Flag:** The following samples have a doublet rate > 15%:",
      paste(flagged, collapse = ", "), "\n")
} else {
  cat("_No samples exceed the 15% doublet rate threshold._\n")
}
```

```{r doublet-overall, results='asis'}
total_cells    <- nrow(seu_02@meta.data)
total_doublets <- sum(seu_02@meta.data$scDblFinder.class == "doublet")
overall_pct    <- round(total_doublets / total_cells * 100, 1)
cat(sprintf("**Total nuclei:** %d | **Doublets:** %d | **Overall doublet rate:** %.1f%%\n",
            total_cells, total_doublets, overall_pct))
```

```{r doublet-score-hist, fig.width=8, fig.height=4}
ggplot(seu_02@meta.data, aes(x = scDblFinder.score, fill = scDblFinder.class)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 100, alpha = 0.6, position = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(singlet = "steelblue", doublet = "tomato")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = paste0("scDblFinder score distribution — ", track_display, " track"),
       x = "Score", y = "Count", fill = "Class")
```

---

## Section 3: Cell Filtering

```{r cell-filtering-setup}
nfeature_threshold <- ifelse(params$track == "decontx", 800, 700)
track_label        <- ifelse(params$track == "decontx", "DecontX", "SoupX")

seu_pre <- seu_02
seu_pre[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(seu_pre, pattern = "^MT-")
meta_pre <- seu_pre@meta.data
```

```{r filter-summary-table}
keepMito  <- sum(meta_pre$percent.mt <= 20)
keepGenes <- sum(meta_pre$nFeature_RNA > nfeature_threshold)
keepUMI   <- sum(meta_pre$nCount_RNA > 500)
keepDub   <- sum(meta_pre$scDblFinder.class == "singlet")

kept_barcodes <- rownames(meta_pre)[
  meta_pre$percent.mt <= 20 &
  meta_pre$nFeature_RNA > nfeature_threshold &
  meta_pre$nCount_RNA > 500 &
  meta_pre$scDblFinder.class == "singlet"
]

df_filt <- data.frame(
  Filter  = c("Total",
              "percent.mt <= 20%",
              paste0("nFeature > ", nfeature_threshold),
              "nCount > 500",
              "Singlets only",
              "Pass all"),
  N_nuclei = c(nrow(meta_pre), keepMito, keepGenes, keepUMI, keepDub,
                length(kept_barcodes))
)
knitr::kable(df_filt,
             col.names = c("Filter criterion", "Nuclei passing"),
             caption = paste0(track_label, " track: nuclei passing each filter"))
```

```{r cell-filtering-vln, fig.width=12, fig.height=5}
VlnPlot(seu_pre,
        features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"),
        group.by = "sample_group", pt.size = 0.01, ncol = 3) &
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r pre-post-counts}
counts_tbl <- data.frame(
  Track         = track_label,
  Pre_filter    = ncol(seu_pre),
  Post_filter   = ncol(seu_03),
  Cells_removed = ncol(seu_pre) - ncol(seu_03),
  Pct_removed   = round((ncol(seu_pre) - ncol(seu_03)) / ncol(seu_pre) * 100, 1)
)
knitr::kable(counts_tbl,
             col.names = c("Track", "Pre-filter", "Post-filter",
                           "Nuclei removed", "% removed"),
             caption = "Nuclei removed by QC filtering")
```

---

## Section 4: Clustering

```{r clustering-setup}
nf <- 10000
isN_markers <- c("TUBB3", "PRPH", "SNAP25",
                 "CALCA", "TRPV1",
                 "MRGPRD",
                 "NTRK2", "NTRK3",
                 "POU5F1", "SOX2", "NANOG")
```

```{r clustering-counts}
tbl_group <- as.data.frame(table(seu_04$sample_group))
colnames(tbl_group) <- c("sample_group", "Nuclei")
knitr::kable(tbl_group,
             caption = paste0("Post-clustering nucleus counts per sample — ", track_display))
```

```{r umap-harmony-clusters, fig.width=8, fig.height=7}
centroids_harm_cl <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(seu_04, "umap.harmony"))
centroids_harm_cl$harmony_res.0.2 <- seu_04$harmony_res.0.2
centroids_harm_cl <- aggregate(. ~ harmony_res.0.2, centroids_harm_cl, mean)

p_harmony_clusters <- DimPlot(seu_04,
                               reduction = "umap.harmony",
                               group.by  = "harmony_res.0.2",
                               label     = FALSE,
                               pt.size   = 0.5) +
  ggtitle(paste0("iSN Harmony clusters (res 0.2, nf=", nf, ") — ", track_display)) +
  xlab("UMAP 1") + ylab("UMAP 2") +
  theme(
    plot.title   = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title   = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text    = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 11)
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data    = centroids_harm_cl,
    aes(x = umapharmony_1, y = umapharmony_2, label = harmony_res.0.2),
    size    = 5, color = "black", segment.color = "grey50",
    box.padding = 0.8, max.overlaps = Inf
  )

p_harmony_clusters
```

```{r umap-harmony-sample, fig.width=8, fig.height=7}
p_harmony_samples <- DimPlot(seu_04,
                              reduction = "umap.harmony",
                              group.by  = "sample",
                              label     = FALSE,
                              pt.size   = 0.5) +
  ggtitle(paste0("iSN Harmony — sample (nf=", nf, ") — ", track_display)) +
  xlab("UMAP 1") + ylab("UMAP 2") +
  theme(
    plot.title   = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title   = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text    = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 11)
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = timepoint_colors)

p_harmony_samples
```

```{r dotplot-markers, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
p_dot <- DotPlot(seu_04, features = isN_markers, group.by = "harmony_res.0.2") +
  RotatedAxis() +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "white", high = "red",
                       limits = c(-1, 3), oob = squish) +
  ggtitle(paste0("iSN marker gene expression by cluster — ", track_display))

p_dot
```

---

## Section 5: Individual Stage Reports

```{r stage-report-paths, results='asis'}
if (params$track == "decontx") {
  cat(
    "Stage reports are available at the following paths relative to the project root:\n\n",
    "- **Stage 01.2 (DecontX):**  \n",
    "  `scripts/01.2_DecontX/DecontX_out/01.2_DecontX_report.html`\n\n",
    "- **Stage 02.1 (scDblFinder — DecontX track):**  \n",
    "  `scripts/02.1_scDblFinder_decontX/scDblFinder_output/02.1_scDblFinder_report.html`\n\n",
    "- **Stage 03 (Cell Filtering — decontX):**  \n",
    "  `scripts/03_Cell_filtering/Cell_filtering_output/03_cell_filtering_report_decontX.html`\n\n",
    "- **Stage 04 (Clustering — decontX):**  \n",
    "  `scripts/04_Clustering/clustering_output/04_clustering_report_decontX.html`\n",
    sep = ""
  )
} else {
  cat(
    "Stage reports are available at the following paths relative to the project root:\n\n",
    "- **Stage 01 (SoupX):**  \n",
    "  `scripts/01_SoupX/SoupX_dir_out/01_SoupX_report.html`\n\n",
    "- **Stage 02 (scDblFinder — SoupX track):**  \n",
    "  `scripts/02_scDblFinder_soupx/scDblFinder_output/02_scDblFinder_report.html`\n\n",
    "- **Stage 03 (Cell Filtering — soupX):**  \n",
    "  `scripts/03_Cell_filtering/Cell_filtering_output/03_cell_filtering_report_soupX.html`\n\n",
    "- **Stage 04 (Clustering — soupX):**  \n",
    "  `scripts/04_Clustering/clustering_output/04_clustering_report_soupX.html`\n",
    sep = ""
  )
}
```

---

## Session Info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
